title: Login with valid credentials and see the dashboard
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can log in with email and password and reach the dashboard with protected content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify recent notification content is displayed

title: Create and complete a batch label print job
description: A production or warehouse user can create a batch label print job, open the print-ready page, and complete printing so the job is recorded as finished.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a batch detail page from the production or inventory area
Trigger the batch label print action
Open the generated print-ready label page
Complete the browser print flow
Verify the print job is recorded as completed
Verify an audit entry for the print job is visible

title: Show protected access handling for unauthenticated print monitoring
description: A visitor without an authenticated session is kept out of print monitoring and protected data is not shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /printing
Verify access is denied to the protected page
Verify dashboard data is not displayed

title: Log in and reach the dashboard with recent activity visible
description: An authenticated user can log in and land on the dashboard where protected recent notifications or metrics are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify recent protected activity or metrics are displayed

title: View an isolated label page for an existing print job
description: A user can open a valid label print job page and see a print-ready layout that is separate from the normal application chrome.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a previously created label print job from the print flow or history
Open the label print page for that job
Verify a print-ready label layout is displayed
Verify the normal application navigation is hidden

title: Reprint a completed job with a required reason
description: A supervisor or administrator can request a reprint for a completed job by providing a valid reason and see the reprint recorded.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open print monitoring
Select a completed print job
Request a reprint
Fill in a valid reprint reason
Submit the reprint request
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify a reprint audit entry is displayed

title: View the printer management page as an administrator
description: This verifies that an administrator can access printer management and see the printer configuration interface.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin users link
Verify the admin area is displayed
Verify printer management controls are displayed

title: Review print history and submit a reasoned reprint
description: A supervisor or administrator can open print history, request a reprint with a reason, and see the reprint recorded as an immutable audit entry.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the print history page from the printing area
Open a completed print job from history
Request a reprint for that job
Provide a reason for the reprint
Submit the reprint request
Verify the reprint is recorded in history
Verify the original job remains unchanged

title: Print an operational summary with the application chrome hidden
description: A user can open a production or stock summary print flow and reach a document view that uses a clean printable layout.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the production or inventory summary page
Trigger the summary print action
Verify a print-ready document layout is displayed
Verify the application chrome is hidden

title: View dashboard metrics and recent notifications
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can open the dashboard and see summary metrics along with recent notifications.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the dashboard link
Verify dashboard metrics are displayed
Verify recent notifications are displayed

title: View print queue and job history
description: An authenticated user can open print monitoring and see active jobs and historical print records with their statuses.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open print monitoring
Verify active print jobs are displayed
Verify job history records are displayed

title: Save label template defaults and use them in later jobs
description: An administrator can update printer defaults so that subsequent print jobs use the selected template settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the printer configuration page from administration
Update the default label template or paper settings
Save the printer configuration
Create a new label print job from a batch or product
Verify the configuration change is saved successfully
Verify the new print job uses the updated default template settings

title: View the production page as an authenticated user
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can access the production page and see protected production content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the production link
Verify the production page is displayed
Verify production content is displayed

title: Block reprint actions for users without permission
description: A non-supervisor and non-administrator user cannot access reprint controls for completed jobs.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open print monitoring
Select a completed print job
Verify reprint actions are not available
Verify access is denied for reprint controls

title: View the inventory page as an authenticated user
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can access the inventory page and see protected inventory content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the inventory link
Verify the inventory page is displayed
Verify inventory content is displayed

title: Scan a supported code to open the matching record
description: A keyboard-emulating scanner can enter a supported code on a protected page and navigate to the matching batch or inventory record.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open inventory
Focus a supported search input
Type a valid scanned code into the focused input
Press Enter
Verify the matching record is displayed

title: Capture a failed job for reconciliation after retry
description: An authenticated user can retry a failed print job and see the job status updated for reconciliation tracking.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open print monitoring
Select a failed print job
Retry the failed job
Verify the job status is updated
Verify a reconciliation audit entry is displayed

title: View the recipes page as an authenticated user
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can access the recipes page and see protected recipe content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the recipes link
Verify the recipes page is displayed
Verify recipe content is displayed

title: Reject unsupported label template settings
description: An administrator cannot save invalid label template or paper size settings and the current configuration remains unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the printer configuration page from administration
Enter unsupported template or paper settings
Save the printer configuration
Verify a validation error is displayed
Verify the configuration is not saved

title: Show empty results for a print history search with no matches
description: An authenticated user can search print history and see an empty state when nothing matches the search criteria.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open print monitoring
Enter a search term that does not match any print jobs
Verify an empty state is displayed
Verify no matching jobs are displayed

title: Show validation when printer configuration is incomplete
description: This verifies that submitting printer settings with missing or invalid values is blocked and validation feedback is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin users link
Open printer management controls
Submit the printer configuration form without required values
Verify validation errors are displayed
Verify the printer configuration is not saved

title: Treat normal typing as a standard search interaction
description: Manual typing into the scanner-enabled input does not trigger scan-specific navigation and follows normal search behavior.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open inventory
Focus a supported search input
Type a short manual search term into the focused input
Press Enter
Verify standard search results or search feedback are displayed

title: Reject printing a draft or deleted batch
description: A user is prevented from creating a label print job for a batch that is not eligible for printing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a draft or deleted batch from the production or inventory area
Trigger the batch label print action
Verify a validation error is displayed
Verify no print job is created

title: Require a reason before submitting a reprint
description: A reprint request cannot be submitted when the required reason is missing or invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open print monitoring
Select a completed print job
Request a reprint
Submit the reprint request without entering a reason
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the reprint is not submitted

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: This verifies that entering invalid credentials keeps the user on the login page and shows an authentication error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify the login page remains displayed
Verify an authentication error is visible

title: Handle an unknown scanned code without a match
description: When a scanner sends an unknown code, the page shows not-found feedback instead of navigating to a record.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open inventory
Focus a supported search input
Type an unknown scanned code into the focused input
Press Enter
Verify not-found feedback is displayed

title: Redirect unauthenticated users away from protected pages
description: This verifies that a user without a valid session cannot open a protected page and is sent to the login screen or a denial state.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify access is denied or the login page is displayed

title: Block summary printing without an authenticated session
description: An unauthenticated visitor cannot open a protected operational print view and is redirected or denied access.

steps.description: Navigate to /production
Trigger the summary print action
Verify access is denied or the login screen is shown
Verify no print preview is displayed

title: Search printer history with no matching results
description: This verifies that searching print history for a term with no matches shows an empty state instead of results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin users link
Open print history
Search for a term with no matches
Verify an empty state message is displayed
Verify no history results are displayed
